case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. SANTIAGO DZUL COCOM

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE SEP-19-2024. SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT. (ENVOLOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER NO SUCH NUMBER UNABLE TO FORWARD)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COCOM, SANTIAGO DZUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50 SERVED AUG-15-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COCOM, SANTIAGO DZUL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-18-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT SANTIAGO DZUL COCOM IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE TO FACILITATE A SETTLEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COCOM, SANTIAGO DZUL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLIN BOTEO. DEFENDANT SANTIAGO DZUL COCOM IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
